name: Cold Email Outreach - BayFlow (Flow B DISABLED - use sales-sequence-engine.json)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ business_name: $json.business_name, email: $json.email, first_name: $json.first_name, last_name: $json.last_name, phone: $json.phone, website: $json.website, city: $json.city, state: $json.state, source: $json.source, status: 'new', email_verified: $json.email_verified || false, email_verify_result: $json.email_verify_result || null, phone_type: $json.phone_type || null, dnc_checked: $json.dnc_checked || false, created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

nodes.name: Daily 8AM Tue-Fri Email Sender [DISABLED - use sales-sequence-engine.json with Smartlead]

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'Shalin at BayFlow <shalin@bayflow.com>', to: [$json.email], subject: $json.emailSubject, text: $json.emailText }) }}

nodes.name: Send Email via Resend [DISABLED - replaced by Smartlead in sales-sequence-engine.json]

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: $json.newStatus, last_contacted_at: new Date().toISOString(), last_email_type: $json.emailType, last_resend_id: $json.resendId }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $('Process Send Result').first().json.id, email_type: $('Process Send Result').first().json.emailType, sent: $('Process Send Result').first().json.sent, resend_id: $('Process Send Result').first().json.resendId, sent_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ business_id: 'bayflow', channel: 'email', outreach_type: $('Process Send Result').first().json.emailType, audience_type: 'auto_repair', tone: $('Process Send Result').first().json.selectedTone, angle: $('Process Send Result').first().json.selectedAngle, hook_type: $('Process Send Result').first().json.selectedHook, intent: 'book_demo', subject_line: $('Process Send Result').first().json.emailSubject, content_preview: ($('Process Send Result').first().json.emailText || '').substring(0, 200), personalization_elements: { name: !!$('Process Send Result').first().json.first_name, city: !!$('Process Send Result').first().json.city, business_name: true }, personalization_depth: ($('Process Send Result').first().json.first_name ? 1 : 0) + ($('Process Send Result').first().json.city ? 1 : 0) + 1, day_of_week: new Date().getDay(), hour_of_day: new Date().getHours(), lead_email: $('Process Send Result').first().json.email, outcome: 'pending', sent_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'replied', replied_at: $('Parse Reply').first().json.replyDate, reply_sentiment: $('Parse Reply').first().json.sentiment }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID, text: 'Cold Email Reply

From: ' + $('Parse Reply').first().json.fromEmail + '
Sentiment: ' + $('Parse Reply').first().json.sentiment + '
Subject: ' + $('Parse Reply').first().json.subject + '

Preview: ' + $('Parse Reply').first().json.body.substring(0, 300), parse_mode: 'HTML' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ email: $('Parse Reply').first().json.fromEmail, task_type: 'follow_up_positive_reply', subject: $('Parse Reply').first().json.subject, reply_preview: $('Parse Reply').first().json.body.substring(0, 500), status: 'pending', created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', email: $('Parse Reply').first().json.fromEmail, sentiment: $('Parse Reply').first().json.sentiment }) }}

meta.notes: Required environment variables: SERPAPI_API_KEY, HUNTER_API_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY, RESEND_API_KEY, TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID, MILLIONVERIFIER_API_KEY. DNCScrub API key TBD - see DNC Check (Placeholder) node. Outreach intelligence integration: reads from v_outreach_performance, v_best_subject_lines, and outreach_intelligence tables; writes back outcomes on send and reply.
